issue.title: [bug]: ALT + D toggles dark/light theme
issue.body:
### Describe the bug

ALT + D is the default keyboard shortcut in Chrome on Windows and Linux (I'm not sure about macOS) for focusing and modifying the address bar. However, it seems that ui.shadcn.com has overridden this shortcut to toggle the theme between dark mode and light mode instead

### Affected component/components

N/A

### How to reproduce

1. Go to https://ui.shadcn.com/docs/installation/react-router
2. Press ALT + D 
3, See the dark mode changes to light mode

### System Info

```bash
Linux, Chrome
```

### Before submitting

- [x] I've made research efforts and searched the documentation
- [x] I've searched for existing issues
